changes: Fixed an issue wherein the effects of Dissipation would be received while a pet is still summoned when the scholar actions Dissipation and Summon were used at the same time.

Fixed an issue wherein action status effects that cannot normally be prolonged were able to be prolonged when another action is used at the same time the astrologian action Celestial Opposition activates.

new_content.name: Anima weapon story quests
new_content.description: Adjustments to the difficulty of obtaining items required for completion.

new_content.name: Alexander - The Soul of the Creator
new_content.description: Weekly limitation on Alexandrian Gears removed.

new_content.name: Alexander (Savage)
new_content.description: Strength of the Echo increased to 15%.

new_content.name: Dun Scaith
new_content.description: Weekly restrictions on rewards and Mhachi Shillings removed.

new_content.name: Diadem
new_content.description: Penalty added for discarding mission ceruleum after matching.

new_content.name: Mask of Grief
new_content.description: Main scenario quest; issue with BGM addressed.

new_content.name: Deepest Gobdip Exchange
new_content.description: System to exchange Mhachi Farthing, Penny, and Shilling for a Deepest Gobdip.
